<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs small and focused. -->

## What this changes

Describe the change and the motivation. Link any related issue (`Closes #123`).

## How it was verified

- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (offline suite)
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or config changed

## Notes for reviewers

Anything worth calling out — trade-offs, follow-ups, or areas you'd like a
closer look at.
